name: Jed's Briefing
description: You listened to Jed outline the plan inside Nova's House.

name: Scrap Run Accepted
description: Tyson asked you to run his ration errand.

name: Tyson Briefed You
description: You talked to Tyson and heard about the ration crate.
toast: Tyson told you where the rations are stashed.

name: Ration Pack Collected
description: You grabbed the ration pack from Tyson's back room.

name: Scrap Run Complete
description: You delivered the ration pack to Ollie.

name: Fixer's Favor Accepted
description: Jed asked you to take over the repairs on his bench.
toast: Jed wants you at the tinkering table.

name: Jed Briefed You
description: You talked with Jed about the pending repairs.
toast: Jed hands you a basket of parts.

name: Bench Opened
description: You opened the tinkering table to begin Jed's tutorial.
toast: The bench is ready for repairs.

name: First Repair Complete
description: You finished the first repair during Jed's tutorial.

name: Fixer's Favor Complete
description: You finished the tutorial and debriefed with Jed.
toast: Jed trusts you with the bench now.

name: Lights Out
description: A blackout hit Nova's house and the breaker needs attention.
toast: Find the breaker and restore power.

name: House Lights Restored
description: Nova brought the lights back online and can leave the house.
toast: Nova's house is lit once more.

name: Recovered Ellie's Display
description: You have the busted arcade display that Ellie asked for.

name: Recovered Maddie's Grinder
description: You salvaged Maddie's coffee grinder.

name: Recovered Kasey's Projector
description: You found Kasey's projector lens.

name: Delivered Repair Bundle
description: Jed received all three broken devices.
toast: Jed received the bundle of broken devices.

name: Repairs Finished
description: Jed finished the repairs and sent you to return the gear.
toast: Return the fixed gear to their owners.

name: Returned Ellie's Display
description: You brought the repaired arcade display back to Ellie.

name: Returned Maddie's Grinder
description: You returned the repaired coffee grinder to Maddie.

name: Returned Kasey's Projector
description: You returned the repaired projector to Schoolteacher Kasey.

name: Delivered Repaired Gear
description: All three repaired items are back where they belong.

name: Tinkering Unlocked
description: Jed opened the tinkering table and the tutorial is ready.
toast: Jed unlocked tinkering. Head to the table to continue.

name: Tinkering Tutorial
description: You completed Jed's tinkering tutorial.

name: Met Ollie
description: You bumped into Ollie on Main Road and heard his warning.

name: Ollie Joined
description: Ollie agreed to tag along after you checked in with him on the Main Road.

name: Restored Mine Power
description: The Stellarium generator roared back to life.
toast: The Stellarium generator roars to life.

name: Jed Checked In
description: You reached Jed after waking up and heard the pressure behind his latest repair job.
toast: Jed is waiting at the main bench.

name: Bunk Light On
description: Nova turned on the bunk light before leaving her room.

name: The Wrong Note
description: Nova's bunk light revealed a cold reflection pulsing against the machinery's rhythm.
toast: Something impossible is hiding inside the light.

name: Three-Beat Opening
description: Nova traced the resonance and learned to hear the open beat inside a machine cycle.
toast: Two beats of noise. One opening.

name: Pattern Recognized
description: Nova recognized the bunk's three-note pattern in Jed's faulted loader.
toast: The loader is keeping the same bad rhythm.

name: Tempo Stolen
description: Nova used the resonance opening to shut down the faulted loader and reach Jed's bench.

name: Gear Accounted For
description: Nova checked the cargo netting before leaving her bunk.

name: Bunk Checked
description: Nova checked the bunk and gathered herself before leaving the Pit.

name: Workbench Briefing
description: Jed told Nova to repair the Cryo-Inductor at his workbench.
toast: Jed points you to the workbench.

name: Homestead Operations
description: You completed Nova's onboarding and tinkering training with Jed.

name: Checkpoint Denial
description: Guard Hank blocked Nova at the Transit Checkpoint and sent her to the Admin window.

name: Shift Clearance Ordered
description: Jed sent Nova to the Transit Checkpoint for mandatory mine clearance.
toast: Jed sends you to shift clearance.

name: Zeke's Override
description: Zeke buried Nova's retirement flag and issued the mine access badge.

name: Admin Gate Breach
description: You spoofed the liability form and bypassed Hank to unlock the Admin Gate.

name: Sector 4 Assignment
description: Foreman Boggs sent Nova into Sector 4 to clear the interference.

name: Relic Synchronized
description: You synchronized with the Tuning Fork relic deep within the mines.
toast: A heavy frequency vibrates in your mind.

name: Cargo Lift Escape
description: Jed stayed behind to hold the lift controls, allowing you to escape to the Launch Bay with the Chime.
toast: Jed stays behind. You hold the Chime.

name: Chime Spliced
description: You connected Jed's Chime to the launch pod core and forced the colony systems to accept the escape route.
toast: The Chime locks into the pod core.

name: Pod Path Clear
description: Zeke opened the pod hatch after Nova defeated the Warden and moved to secure the launch core.

name: The Crash
description: You launched the cargo pod and crashed into Sector 9 after colliding with the planetary resonance shield.
toast: The sky was a wall. You crashed.

name: Scavenger Tip
description: Scrapper told Nova about an old rebel cache hidden near Trade Row.

name: Cache Opened
description: Nova opened the old rebel cache and found proof for Scrapper.

name: Stash Settled
description: Nova returned the cache proof to Scrapper and collected the grenades.

name: Vent Trouble
description: Doc asked Nova to clear the contaminated med-bay vents.

name: Vent Patched
description: Nova patched the toxic vent blockage feeding fumes into the med-bay.

name: System Flush Complete
description: Nova reported the vent repair to Doc and received the corrosive round mod.

name: Required Training
description: Foreman Boggs assigned Nova to mandatory shield training through the blocked cargo route.

name: Hydraulic Kick Ready
description: Nova brought the loader online and unlocked the guard-break training moment.

name: Guard Break Trained
description: Nova learned how to break shielded enemies before committing damage.

name: Chime Recovered
description: You recovered the Chime from the crashed pod core.

name: Ruins Discovered
description: You followed the stream and completed the trek into Sector 9 Ruins.

name: Sanctuary Gate Opened
description: You placed the Chime into the Temple Gate and entered the sanctuary facility.

name: Awakened the Tuner
description: You stabilized the stasis chamber and woke Orion.

name: Assailant Truce
description: You defeated the Source Beast on Canopy Ridge and recruited Gh0st.

name: Planetary Escape
description: You launched the Astra ship and transitioned to the Spire.

name: Base Secured
description: You secured a base of operations in Zeke's old apartment and established a Source shield.

name: The Plan Formulated
description: You gathered all necessary data and finalized the heist strategy at the planning table.

name: Streetwise
description: Jax granted you a discount in the local shops for repairing The Static's sign.

name: Gh0st: Intercept
description: Gh0st unlocked his Intercept combat skill after finding archives on Elara.

name: Night Market Lit
description: You restored the Night Market lanterns before patrols could use the darkness as an excuse to clear the stalls.

name: Upper City Access
description: You infiltrated the Upper City and passed the penthouse scanners.

name: Lens Acquired
description: You stole the Lens relic from the Archive and unlocked Scan.

name: Spire Escaped
description: You defeated the Administrator and escaped the Spire aboard the Astra.

name: Foundry Course Set
description: The Astra is headed for the Foundry to hunt a Deep-Core Engine.

name: Blackmail Leverage
description: You stole an executive ledger and gained leverage over Upper City prices.

name: Phase Trial Complete
description: You completed the prototype weapon trial and earned Phase Rounds.

name: Compliance Bulletin Heard
description: Vale announced the Sector 7 audit over the Foundry PA.

name: Obsidian Shelf Secured
description: The Astra landed in Sector 7 and confirmed it needs Foundry hardware to climb higher.

name: Slag River Crossed
description: You learned the flare rhythm and crossed the Slag River.

name: Cooling Vents Hacked
description: Zeke forced the Foundry vents into maintenance mode.

name: Phantom Records Found
description: You opened the Project Phantom records and exposed Gh0st's origin.

name: Gh0st Regrouped
description: Gh0st chose his own path and gave Nova his override key.

name: Foundry Gate Opened
description: You crossed the Slag River and opened the Service Airlock into the factory.

name: Project Phantom Revealed
description: Gh0st learned the truth about Project Phantom and gave Nova his override key.
toast: Ghost in the Machine is complete.

name: Foundry Ammo Sabotaged
description: You destroyed three Dominion ammo crates in the Slag Pits.

name: Crate Alpha Destroyed
description: You destroyed the ammo crate at the Slag River.

name: Crate Beta Destroyed
description: You destroyed the ammo crate at Waste Intake.

name: Crate Gamma Destroyed
description: You destroyed the ammo crate at the Service Airlock.

name: Worker Traced
description: You found the missing engineer's tablet and coolant rig.

name: Lost Worker Found
description: You recovered the missing engineer's coolant rig.

name: Scavenger
description: You salvaged useful machine parts from destroyed Foundry mechs.

name: Mechs Salvaged
description: You stripped usable parts from the wrecked mechs at Waste Intake.

name: Assembly Line Broken
description: You overloaded the Phantom fabrication matrix.

name: Conveyors Timed
description: You learned the production floor's crusher rhythm.

name: Prototypes Defeated
description: You defeated the Phantom Prototype wave.

name: Matrix Overloaded
description: You broke the fabrication matrix feeding the Phantom line.

name: Anvil Cradle Opened
description: You read the Forge timing rhythm and opened the Anvil cradle.

name: Anvil Claimed
description: Nova claimed the Anvil and unlocked Construct.

name: Anvil Acquired
description: You stole the Anvil relic and unlocked Construct.

name: Foundry Meltdown
description: You defeated Rylos, stole the Deep-Core Engine, and escaped the Foundry.

name: Rylos Confronted
description: Gh0st faced Commander Rylos and rejected his unit number.

name: Titan Walker Defeated
description: You defeated Rylos's Titan Walker.

name: Deep-Core Engine Stolen
description: You stole the Deep-Core Engine from Vale's Ascension Cradle supply chain.

name: Phase-Cutter Arrays Stolen
description: You stole the Phase-Cutter Arrays for the Astra.

name: Void Course Set
description: The Astra can now reach high orbit and push toward the Void.

name: Quality Control Resolved
description: You resolved the sentient defective unit queue.

name: Defective Units Spared
description: You let the waking defective units keep their spark.

name: Hazard Trial Cleared
description: You survived the overclocked Forge hazard waves.

name: Overclocked Trial Complete
description: You survived the Foundry hazard trial.

name: Ring Boarded
description: You broke the Compliance fighter screen and forced entry through the Executive Dock.

name: Halo Approached
description: The Astra reached the Orbital Ring on stolen Foundry hardware.

name: Fighter Screen Broken
description: The Astra's Phase-Cutter Arrays broke the Compliance fighter screen.

name: Forced Dock
description: The Astra rammed the Executive Dock collar and survived.

name: Airlock Hacked
description: Gh0st broke the Ring airlock's old Thorne cipher.

name: Great Silence Revealed
description: You found Thorne and learned that Harmony is an Architect atrocity repackaged as infrastructure.

name: Solarium Crossed
description: Nova crossed the Ring's curated false paradise.

name: Security Hub Cleared
description: You broke the Security Hub patrol.

name: Zero-G Shaft Traversed
description: The crew timed the Hunter-Killer sweeps through the zero-g service shaft.

name: Mainframe Accessed
description: You opened the Great Silence log in the Ring mainframe.

name: Thorne Found
description: You found Director Thorne trapped inside Vale's Ring lockdown.

name: Corporate Insight
description: Thorne's personal logs exposed Dominion command habits.

name: Solarium Restored
description: You realigned the Solarium mirrors and cleared the void-moss.

name: Vacuum Sealed
description: You sealed the Executive Dock hull breaches.

name: Hull Breaches Sealed
description: The Executive Dock breach map is sealed and stable.

name: Core Firewall Breached
description: You disabled the three firewall nodes and destroyed their hard-light guardian.

name: Server Route Mapped
description: Zeke mapped the Deep Ring firewall route by coolant pulse.

name: Firewall Alpha Down
description: You disabled Firewall Node Alpha.

name: Firewall Beta Down
description: You disabled Firewall Node Beta.

name: Firewall Gamma Down
description: You disabled Firewall Node Gamma and exposed the hard-light construct.

name: Anchor Acquired
description: You found Elara, recovered the Anchor, and unlocked Stasis.

name: Anchor Chamber Entered
description: The crew reached Elara's Anchor Chamber.

name: Elara Found
description: Gh0st found Elara alive inside the Ring.

name: Anchor Taken
description: Nova took the Anchor and unlocked Stasis.

name: Into the Tear
description: You defeated the Compliance Avatar and followed Vale beyond reality.

name: Throne Reached
description: Nova reached Vale's Throne Room.

name: Soloist Witnessed
description: Vale executed Thorne and activated the Soloist beyond Stasis.

name: Compliance Avatar Defeated
description: You defeated Vale's Compliance Avatar at the Tear.

name: Source Access
description: The crew crossed the Tear into the Source.

name: Data Shield
description: You recovered defensive routines from a purged server.

name: Admin Privileges
description: You opened the executive armory with the SysAdmin keycard.

name: SysAdmin Keycard Found
description: You recovered the dead SysAdmin's keycard.

name: Starborn Reassembled
description: You freed Zeke, Gh0st, and Orion from their nightmares and claimed the Key.

name: Beginning Faced
description: Nova crossed the distorted memory of the Mines without accepting its judgment.
toast: The Echo of the Mines is complete.

name: Singularity Reached
description: The crew built the memory bridge and reached the final ascent together.

name: Legacy
description: Jed's echo reminded Nova what survival protects.

name: Jed's Marks
description: Nova found the imperfections Vale could not counterfeit.

name: The Real Lesson
description: Nova chose Jed's lesson over preserving his ghost.

name: Unshackled
description: Zeke deleted the record that reduced him to company property.

name: Recursive Record
description: Zeke exposed the backups recreating his file.

name: Authority Revoked
description: Zeke rejected the file's authority instead of deleting another copy.

name: Source Balance
description: Gh0st recovered Elara's voice without Dominion command layers.

name: Buried Voice
description: Gh0st isolated Elara's voice beneath the orders.

name: No Hidden Order
description: Gh0st broke the command carrier without erasing Elara.

name: Center Reached
description: The Starborn crossed the memory spiral and broke the last nightmare defenses.
toast: The Spire of Thought is complete.

name: Final Note
description: The Starborn circuit defeated Vale and closed the Tear.

name: Starborn
description: Nova tuned the world without surrendering anyone's voice.

name: A Long Story
description: The crew gathered at Zeke's diner beneath an open sky.

name: Ancestral Grace
description: Orion found the first Architects' resting current.

name: Names Beneath
description: Orion traced the Aethel names beneath the threshold.

name: Many-Voiced Grave
description: Orion tuned the grave as a chorus rather than one note.

name: Starborn Mod
description: You recovered the Astra's future hull and forged the ultimate weapon mod.

name: Preventable Future
description: The crew identified the doomed future Astra's timeline.

name: Warning Salvaged
description: Zeke detached the hull without accepting its ending.

name: Erased Index
description: Nova recovered an erased cold-case number.

name: Deleted Transfer
description: Gh0st found the witness transfer record.

name: Stolen Current
description: Nova traced the market's power into an executive sign.

name: Market Grid Ready
description: Executive power now feeds the Night Market.

name: Rotating Credential
description: Nova copied the lounge safe credential.

name: Private Evidence
description: Nova stole the encrypted executive ledger.

name: Targeting Bias
description: Nova found and reversed the prototype's worker bias.

name: Prototype Trial
description: The corrected prototype survived its drone trial.

name: Final Ping
description: Nova traced the missing engineer toward the springs.

name: Coolant Shelter
description: Nova found the engineer's hidden shelter and route map.

name: Intake Jammed
description: Nova stopped the intake before it consumed the mech pile.

name: Empathic Hesitation
description: Gh0st learned why the units were rejected.

name: Heat Sequence
description: Nova mapped the overclock chamber's safe beat.

name: Redaction Map
description: The Director's removed lines can be reconstructed.

name: Unredacted Record
description: Thorne's private logs are ready to publish.

name: Mirrors Realigned
description: The false sun is restored but still misdirected.

name: Purge Trail
description: Zeke traced the defensive backup into a cold rack.

name: Guardian Recovered
description: Zeke recovered the defensive routine.
